items.title: Aiper pool cleaners and smart devices are getting up to 31% spring discounts ahead of swim season starting from $130
items.summary:
During the weeklong Amazon Big Spring Sale, you can prep for upcoming pool weather with up to 31% discounts on Aiper pool cleaners and smart devices. A solid option among the less advanced and more budget-friendly models is Aiper’s 2026 upgraded Seagull SE Cordless Robotic Pool Cleaner for above-ground pools at $149.99 shipped in the white colorway, while the grey/green colorway model is sitting higher at $159.99 shipped, after clipping the on-page coupon. Normally going for $200 at full price here, this particular model has been spending most of the time since February between $160 and $170. The deal here gives you up to 25% savings that cut either $40 or $50 off the going rate, giving you a nice, wallet-friendly means to keep your above-ground pool’s floor clear of debris, with my own brother having been using one for nearly two years now. Head below to check out all the Aiper deals we’ve collected for you in one place.

more…

While it may be listed directly with a $599 MSRP, over at Amazon the price only climbs as high as $529, with discounts over the past year having mostly kept costs above $339, though we have seen it drop down to this same rate twice since December. Now, you’re getting another chance at a 40% markdown that cuts $214 off the going rate ($284 off the MSRP) for the second-lowest price we have tracked – just $16 above the one-time low we spotted during Black Friday. Head below to learn more about this popular compact power solution and browse the other units seeing better discounts at Amazon. For many of the brand’s larger models, be sure to check out our coverage of EcoFlow’s ongoing direct Spring Sale.

items.summary:
Carhartt gear is on sale now for Amazon’s Big Spring Sale, with a wide range of men’s gear seeing solid markdowns for the event. From everyday basics to heavier-duty layers, this is one of the better chances we typically get outside of major holiday sales to score Carhartt at a discount.

We’re spotting deals on classic pocket tees, logo shirts, and all the rugged everyday staples Carhartt is known for. The brand’s built its reputation on dependable workwear and durable essentials, and right now is the perfect time to stock up for spring without paying full price.

The sale also reaches into Carhartt’s tougher lineup, including its tougher, more rugged hoodies, layers, and jackets. All in, it’s a pretty easy win if you’ve been meaning to upgrade your rotation with gear that’s built to last. Shop all the Carhartt deals here.

items.title: Power your spring adventures with up to 62% EcoFlow power station discounts in latest sale starting from $169
items.summary:
Update: This sale is officially slated to end after March 31, 2026, so don’t dawdle too long on decisions!

Now that EcoFlow’s Monthly Madness event has ended, the brand has shifted to its Spring Sale promotions with up to 62% discounts across its power stations, with free a FREE 45W solar panel given to orders that hit $600 and a FREE 220W solar panel on orders over $2,500. Among the models retaining their previous sale pricing, we spotted EcoFlow’s DELTA 3 Classic Portable Power Station going for $449 shipped, which matches the price we’re seeing over in the brand’s Amazon storefront. This particular model has been keeping down from its full $599 price tag since January, with discounts over the last year having gone as low as $349, which we last saw during Black Friday. This same rate has been holding strong through the last few sales we’ve seen through February (outside of some one-day flash sales), with it continuing into this month with a $150 markdown that lands it just $100 above the Black Friday low. Head below to learn more about it, as well as browse the full lineup of deals to power your spring time adventures.
